user.description: Select a Wolink ESL device to configure, or enter a MAC address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Found Wolink ESL device: {name}. Select the display model.

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.no_devices_found: No Wolink ESL devices found nearby

data_description.max_retry_count: Number of BLE connection attempts before giving up (1-10)
data_description.advertisement_timeout: How long to wait for the device to advertise (10-300s)
data_description.connect_timeout: How long to wait for BLE connection after detection (5-60s)
data_description.compress: Compress image data before BLE transfer (faster for most images)
data_description.mirror: Flip the image before sending (horizontal = left-right, vertical = top-bottom)
